uplink._note: TTN example input; expected.data authored from reference/upstream-codec.js fPort 6 status frame: bytes[3]=30 -> 3.0 V battery, bytes[4]=1 (status) -> vibration alarm => action.motion.detected. Upstream emits Volt/status; we normalize to vocabulary keys.
Synthetic: bytes[3]=35 -> 3.5 V, bytes[4]=0 -> no vibration => action.motion.detected false. Confirms the cleared-alarm branch.

uplink.description: Status report — vibration detected, low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic: bytes[3]=158=0x9E, high bit set -> lowBattery extra true and battery (0x1E=30)/10 = 3.0 V; bytes[4]=1 -> vibration detected.
TTN example input; bytes[2]=0 is the version/datecode frame (no measurement) per reference/upstream-codec.js => error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is not a data report
uplink._note: TTN example input; fPort 7 carries config request/response frames, not measurements => error.
